# @chespeake/ui

> A typescript pacckage containing multiple applications and a shared component library for building modern web interfaces. The shared package provides a comprehensive design system with React components, Tailwind CSS presets, and design tokens for consistent UI development across all Chesapeake projects.

This repository contains a shared component library (`apps/shared/`) that provides a complete design system for building user interfaces. The design system includes pre-built React components, CSS custom properties for theming, and Tailwind CSS configuration that can be easily integrated into any React application.

The shared package follows modern React patterns with TypeScript, uses Radix UI primitives for accessibility, and implements a comprehensive theming system with dark mode support. All components are designed to work together cohesively while remaining flexible for customization.

## Quick Setup Example

To use the design system in a new React app:

1. **Install dependencies**: `npm install react react-dom tailwindcss tw-animate-css`
2. **Import styles** in `src/index.css`:
   ```css
   @import "tailwindcss";
   @import "tw-animate-css";
   @import "@shared/styles/index.css";
   ```
3. **Configure Tailwind** in `tailwind.config.ts`:
   ```typescript
   import sharedPreset from '@shared/tailwind.preset'
   export default { presets: [sharedPreset] }
   ```
4. **Use components**:
   ```tsx
   import { Button } from '@shared/components/ui/button'
   import { ThemeProvider } from '@shared/components/ux/theme-provider'
   
   function App() {
     return (
       <ThemeProvider>
         <Button variant="default">Click me</Button>
       </ThemeProvider>
     )
   }
   ```

## Getting Started

- [Shared Components README](apps/shared/README.md): Complete installation and usage guide for the design system
- [CSS Strategy](apps/shared/CSS_STRATEGY.md): Detailed explanation of the CSS architecture and theming approach

## Component Library

- [UI Components](apps/shared/components/ui/): Basic interface components (Button, Input, Calendar, etc.)
- [UX Components](apps/shared/components/ux/): Complex user experience components (ThemeProvider, ImageUpload, etc.)
- [Design Tokens](apps/shared/styles/tokens.css): CSS custom properties for colors, spacing, and theming
- [Tailwind Preset](apps/shared/tailwind.preset.ts): Tailwind CSS configuration with design system tokens

## Implementation Examples

## Development

- [Package Configuration](apps/shared/package.json): Dependencies and exports for the shared package
